definition.name: def-state-seminorm
definition.definition: For a state rho on B(H), set omega = rho o Phi and the state seminorm ||x||_omega defined by ||x||_omega^2 = omega(x^2) = rho(Phi(x^2)). Since Phi is positive, omega is a positive functional and ||.||_omega is a seminorm on V=B(H)_sa. VERBATIM from report/sections/06-bridge-theorem.tex:179-184: 'For every state rho on B(H) set omega=rho o Phimap, ||x||_omega^2=omega(x^2). Since Phimap is positive, omega is a positive functional and ||.||_omega is a seminorm on V.'
